zh.Forest of Dean, Gloucester, Gloucestersh: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩
zh.Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩
zh.Cold Aston, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可爾德 阿斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William John Treherne於1398年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩時，他的父親John Traherne24歲，母親Mrs John Traherne19歲。他於1423年與Margred Turberville在英國格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1445年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可爾德 阿斯頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William John Treherne于1398年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩时，他的父亲John Traherne24岁，母亲Mrs John Traherne19岁。他于1423年与Margred Turberville在英国格盧斯特斯爾科華士 本 迪恩结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1445年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可爾德 阿斯頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Treherne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Treharne
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and Carmarthenshire): from the Welsh personal name Trahaearn, composed of the elements tra ‘most, very’ + haearn ‘iron’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William John Treherne was born in 1398, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Traherne, was 24 and his mother, Mrs John Traherne, was 19. He married Margred Turberville in 1423, in Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1445, in Cold Aston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William John Treherne est né en 1398, à Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Traherne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Traherne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margred Turberville en 1423, à Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1445, à Cold Aston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William John Treherne è nato il nel 1398 nel Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Traherne, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mrs John Traherne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margred Turberville nel 1423, nel Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William John Treherneが1398年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフォーエスト オフ ディーンで生まれた時，父John Traherneは24歳，母Mrs John Traherneは19歳であった。1423年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフォーエスト オフ ディーンでMargred Turbervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1445年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコルド アストンで47歳で死去した。

ko.Forest of Dean, Gloucester, Gloucestersh: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디
ko.Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William John Treherne(이)가 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Traherne(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs John Traherne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1423년 영국 그루스스터실르 포레스트 프 디에서 Margred Turberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 콜드 애스턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margred Turberville em 1423, em Forest of Dean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William John Treherne родился в 1398 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Traherne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Traherne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margred Turberville в 1423 г. в местности форест оф дин, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1445 г. в местности колд астон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
